diagrams.title: Vector addition: the parallelogram rule
diagrams.caption: Two vectors V1 and V2 acting on object X. The resultant R is found by translating V2 so its origin matches V1's, drawing parallels to each, and taking the diagonal.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Vector addition diagram'><defs><marker id='arr1' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='13' fill='currentColor'><circle cx='110' cy='240' r='4' fill='currentColor'/><text x='90' y='258' fill='var(--text-soft)'>X</text><line x1='110' y1='240' x2='280' y2='200' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arr1)'/><text x='180' y='215' fill='var(--text-soft)'>V₁</text><line x1='110' y1='240' x2='220' y2='100' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arr1)'/><text x='150' y='155' fill='var(--text-soft)'>V₂</text><line x1='280' y1='200' x2='390' y2='60' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><line x1='220' y1='100' x2='390' y2='60' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><line x1='110' y1='240' x2='390' y2='60' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrA)'/><text x='245' y='150' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>R = V₁ + V₂</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Forces on a paraglider in stable glide
diagrams.caption: In steady glide, the resultant aerodynamic force R (vector sum of lift L and drag D) is equal and opposite to the total weight W. R is perpendicular to the flight path.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Force balance in stable glide'><defs><marker id='arr2' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrAc' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrBad' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='13'><path d='M150,140 Q300,90 470,140' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><line x1='150' y1='140' x2='310' y2='190' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2'/><line x1='470' y1='140' x2='310' y2='190' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2'/><circle cx='310' cy='210' r='6' fill='currentColor'/><text x='325' y='216' fill='var(--text-soft)' font-size='12'>pilot</text><line x1='310' y1='210' x2='420' y2='285' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='5 3'/><text x='405' y='305' fill='var(--text-dim)' font-size='11'>flight path</text><line x1='310' y1='210' x2='310' y2='320' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrBad)'/><text x='320' y='280' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>W (weight)</text><line x1='310' y1='210' x2='240' y2='115' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrAc)'/><text x='130' y='100' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>R (resultant)</text><line x1='310' y1='210' x2='275' y2='160' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arr2)'/><text x='245' y='160' fill='currentColor'>L</text><line x1='310' y1='210' x2='370' y2='177' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arr2)'/><text x='380' y='180' fill='currentColor'>D</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Vector addition: parallel and opposite special cases
diagrams.caption: When two vectors share the same direction, magnitudes simply add. When they are opposed, the resultant is the difference of the magnitudes.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Special cases of vector addition'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='160' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Same direction: R = sum</text><text x='440' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Opposite direction: R = difference</text><circle cx='60' cy='110' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><line x1='60' y1='110' x2='150' y2='110' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrC)'/><text x='100' y='100' text-anchor='middle' fill='var(--text-soft)'>V1</text><line x1='150' y1='110' x2='280' y2='110' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrC)'/><text x='220' y='100' text-anchor='middle' fill='var(--text-soft)'>V2</text><line x1='60' y1='180' x2='280' y2='180' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrA)'/><text x='160' y='200' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--accent)'>R = V1 + V2</text><line x1='60' y1='150' x2='60' y2='160' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1'/><line x1='280' y1='150' x2='280' y2='160' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1'/><circle cx='340' cy='110' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><line x1='340' y1='110' x2='540' y2='110' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrC)'/><text x='450' y='100' text-anchor='middle' fill='var(--text-soft)'>V1 (larger)</text><line x1='540' y1='140' x2='400' y2='140' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrC)'/><text x='465' y='160' text-anchor='middle' fill='var(--text-soft)'>V2 (opposite)</text><line x1='340' y1='190' x2='400' y2='190' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrA)'/><text x='430' y='210' text-anchor='start' font-weight='700' fill='var(--accent)'>R = V1 - V2</text><text x='300' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Lengths add only when vectors share direction; subtract when opposed.</text><text x='300' y='320' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>You can never add vectors of different types (e.g. force + speed).</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Drag scaling: linear vs quadratic
diagrams.caption: Drag is linear in exposed area and in air density, but proportional to the SQUARE of wind speed - doubling speed quadruples drag.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Drag scaling laws: linear in area and density, quadratic in speed'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker font-size='12'><line x1='60' y1='310' x2='560' y2='310' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='60' y1='310' x2='60' y2='40' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='560' y='328' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--text-soft)'>variable (x)</text><text x='40' y='50' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--text-soft)'>drag</text><line x1='60' y1='310' x2='510' y2='80' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='420' y='115' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>area, density: linear</text><path d='M 60 310 Q 250 290 350 220 T 510 50' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/><text x='350' y='180' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>speed: D proportional to v squared</text><text x='60' y='328' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>1x</text><text x='285' y='328' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>2x</text><text x='510' y='328' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>3x</text><text x='52' y='314' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>1</text><text x='52' y='195' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>4</text><text x='52' y='85' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>9</text><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Drag scaling - 4 factors</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Drag coefficients of common shapes
diagrams.caption: Drag coefficient Cx captures the effect of shape: ~1.0 for a flat plate, 1.3 for a windward cup, 0.08 for a streamlined teardrop, 0.17 if the streamlined shape is reversed.

diagrams.title: Lift and drag on a flat object
diagrams.caption: A flat surface in oblique wind generates drag parallel to the wind and lift perpendicular to it, directed toward the upper surface. The angle between the wind and the chord is the angle of attack.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Lift and drag on a flat plate in oblique wind'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Flat object in oblique wind: lift and drag are perpendicular</text><line x1='60' y1='180' x2='200' y2='180' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><line x1='60' y1='130' x2='200' y2='130' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><line x1='60' y1='230' x2='200' y2='230' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='60' y='110' fill='var(--warn)' font-size='11'>relative wind</text><line x1='250' y1='240' x2='420' y2='130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='4'/><text x='330' y='250' fill='var(--text-soft)' font-size='11'>flat object</text><circle cx='335' cy='185' r='5' fill='currentColor'/><line x1='335' y1='185' x2='455' y2='185' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrC)'/><text x='465' y='190' font-weight='700' fill='currentColor'>D (drag)</text><line x1='335' y1='185' x2='335' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Drag is parallel to the wind (same direction); lift is perpendicular, toward the upper surface.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Where lift comes from on the profile
diagrams.caption: At about 10 deg angle of attack, roughly 2/3 of lift is suction on the upper surface and 1/3 is pressure on the underside. About 2/3 of the total lift is generated by the front third of the wing.

diagrams.title: Geometric points of a wing profile
diagrams.caption: A paraglider profile is thick and asymmetric, with leading edge (front), trailing edge (rear), median chord (line between them) and thickness at the deepest cross-section.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Geometric points of a wing profile'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Geometry of a wing profile</text><path d='M 110 200 Q 170 140 270 140 Q 400 140 520 195 L 535 200 L 520 205 Q 400 200 270 198 Q 170 200 110 200 Z' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' fill='var(--bg-soft)'/><circle cx='110' cy='200' r='5' fill='var(--accent)'/><text x='80' y='205' text-anchor='end' font-weight='700' fill='var(--accent)'>leading edge</text><circle cx='535' cy='200' r='5' fill='var(--accent)'/><text x='550' y='205' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>trailing edge</text><line x1='110' y1='200' x2='535' y2='200' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 4'/><text x='322' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--accent)'>chord (median)</text><line x1='280' y1='140' x2='280' y2='198' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' marker-start='url(#arrW)' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='265' y='168' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>thickness</text><text x='322' y='110' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>profile length (curved) is slightly longer than the chord</text><text x='300' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Upper surface strongly curved (esp. front third). Lower surface slightly convex.</text><text x='300' y='305' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Profile is thick (~30-40 cm on a paraglider) and ASYMMETRIC.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Aerodynamic points of the profile
diagrams.caption: Three aerodynamic points are NOT fixed geometrically and move with the angle of attack: stagnation point (where airflow splits), center of thrust (where the net force acts), and stall point (where flow detaches on the upper surface).
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Aerodynamic points of a wing profile'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Aerodynamic points on the profile (move with AoA)</text><line x1='30' y1='200' x2='90' y2='200' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='30' y='190' fill='var(--warn)' font-size='11'>relative wind</text><path d='M 110 200 Q 170 140 270 140 Q 400 140 520 195 L 535 200 L 520 205 Q 400 200 270 198 Q 170 200 110 200 Z' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' fill='var(--bg-soft)'/><circle cx='115' cy='205' r='5' fill='var(--accent)'/><text x='80' y='240' text-anchor='middle' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>(a) stagnation</text><text x='80' y='254' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--accent)'>airflow splits here</text><line x1='110' y1='215' x2='90' y2='235' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2'/><circle cx='225' cy='150' r='5' fill='var(--good)'/><text x='225' y='105' text-anchor='middle' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>(b) center of thrust</text><text x='225' y='120' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>net aerodynamic force acts here</text><line x1='225' y1='130' x2='225' y2='145' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='1.2'/><circle cx='460' cy='160' r='5' fill='var(--bad)'/><text x='510' y='110' text-anchor='middle' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>(c) stall point</text><text x='510' y='125' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>airflow detaches above</text><line x1='465' y1='150' x2='495' y2='130' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='1.2'/><text x='300' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>All three points SHIFT as the angle of attack changes.</text><text x='300' y='310' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>AoA increases -> stagnation moves toward leading edge (lower surface).</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Four characteristic angles of attack
diagrams.caption: Behavior at four AoA values: (a) ~10 deg optimum, (b) stall around 25 deg with upper-surface separation, (c) negative AoA inverts the lift, (d) zero AoA leaves only drag and a very small lift.

rotate(-10)'><path d='M 0 30 Q 30 0 80 0 Q 130 0 150 25 L 158 30 L 150 33 Q 130 32 80 32 Q 30 32 0 30 Z' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/></g><line x1='30' y1='130' x2='75' y2='130' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='1.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='110' y='205' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--good)'>(a) ~10 deg</text><text x='110' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>best L/D, optimum</text><text x='110' y='235' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>strong lift, low drag</text><g transform='translate(250 90) rotate(-25)'><path d='M 0 30 Q 30 0 80 0 Q 130 0 150 25 L 158 30 L 150 33 Q 130 32 80 32 Q 30 32 0 30 Z' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/></g><line x1='220' y1='150' x2='265' y2='150' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='1.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><path d='M 320 70 q 10 -10 20 0 q -10 10 0 20 q 10 -10 20 0' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'/><text x='300' y='205' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--bad)'>(b) stall</text><text x='300' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>flow detaches, lift drops</text><text x='300' y='235' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>drag rises sharply</text><g transform='translate(440 80) rotate(15)'><path d='M 0 30 Q 30 0 80 0 Q 130 0 150 25 L 158 30 L 150 33 Q 130 32 80 32 Q 30 32 0 30 Z' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/></g><line x1='410' y1='130' x2='455' y2='130' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='1.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='500' y='205' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--bad)'>(c) negative AoA</text><text x='500' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>NEGATIVE lift</text><text x='500' y='235' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>force points down</text><g transform='translate(610 110)'><path d='M 0 30 Q 30 0 80 0 Q 130 0 150 25 L 158 30 L 150 33 Q 130 32 80 32 Q 30 32 0 30 Z' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/></g><line x1='580' y1='130' x2='625' y2='130' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='1.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='670' y='205' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>(d) AoA = diagrams.title: Polar curve of forces (Cz vs Cx)
diagrams.caption: Plotting lift coefficient against drag coefficient: best glide ratio Fmax is the tangent from the origin (~10 deg AoA). Max Cz at ~20 deg is min sink. Stall ~25 deg makes lift collapse.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Polar curve of forces (Cz vs Cx)'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Polar curve of forces - Cz vs Cx</text><line x1='80' y1='320' x2='550' y2='320' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='80' y1='320' x2='80' y2='50' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='540' y='342' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--text-soft)'>Cx (drag coefficient)</text><text x='70' y='50' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--text-soft)'>Cz (lift coefficient)</text><path d='M 90 320 Q 180 230 230 180 Q 280 120 320 90 Q 380 70 430 130 Q 440 145 420 180' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><line x1='80' y1='320' x2='320' y2='90' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='5 3'/><text x='200' y='200' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700' font-size='11'>tangent = best glide (Fmax)</text><circle cx='320' cy='90' r='5' fill='var(--good)'/><text x='335' y='85' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>Fmax (~10 deg)</text><text x='335' y='100' fill='var(--good)' font-size='11'>best lift/drag</text><circle cx='430' cy='130' r='5' fill='var(--warn)'/><text x='445' y='125' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>max Cz (~20 deg)</text><text x='445' y='140' fill='var(--warn)' font-size='11'>min sink</text><circle cx='420' cy='180' r='5' fill='var(--bad)'/><text x='435' y='175' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>stall (~25 deg)</text><text x='435' y='190' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='11'>lift collapses</text><text x='300' y='350' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Beyond Fmax: more AoA -> more Cz (more lift) but rapidly more Cx (drag)</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Flat vs projected wingspan and area
diagrams.caption: The wing laid flat on the ground always has a larger span and area than its projected (inflated) shadow. Wing loading is calculated using the projected area.

text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>flat on ground</text><rect x='60' y='80' width='220' height='75' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.25' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='60' y1='180' x2='280' y2='180' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' marker-start='url(#arrG)' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='170' y='200' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--good)'>flat wingspan (e)</text><text x='170' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--good)'>flat area S</text><text x='540' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>inflated (shadow)</text><path d='M 410 145 Q 540 60 670 145' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><line x1='410' y1='145' x2='410' y2='180' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><line x1='670' y1='145' x2='670' y2='180' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><line x1='410' y1='180' x2='670' y2='180' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2' marker-start='url(#arrA)' marker-end='url(#arrA)'/><text x='540' y='200' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--accent)'>projected wingspan</text><text x='540' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--accent)'>shadow on ground</text><text x='350' y='250' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Flat wingspan and area are always LARGER than the projected (inflated) values.</text><text x='350' y='270' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Wing loading uses projected area: WL = take-off weight / projected S, typically 2.5-4 kg/m^2.</text><text x='350' y='295' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Aspect ratio = wingspan^2 / area  -- paragliders ~5, hang gliders ~8.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: High vs low aspect ratio
diagrams.caption: Aspect ratio AR = wingspan^2 / area. Paragliders ~5 (deep chord). Hang gliders ~8 (long span). Higher AR = more performance but stronger wingtip vortices.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='High vs low aspect ratio wings'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Aspect ratio (AR) = wingspan^2 / area</text><text x='150' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Paraglider: AR ~5</text><rect x='40' y='95' width='220' height='70' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.18' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='150' y='135' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--accent)'>shorter span, deeper chord</text><line x1='40' y1='180' x2='260' y2='180' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1' marker-start='url(#arrD)' marker-end='url(#arrD)'/><text x='150' y='198' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>wingspan (e)</text><text x='450' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Hang glider: AR ~8</text><rect x='300' y='115' width='300' height='35' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.18' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='450' y='138' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>longer span, shorter chord</text><line x1='300' y1='170' x2='600' y2='170' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1' marker-start='url(#arrD)' marker-end='url(#arrD)'/><text x='450' y='188' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>wingspan (e)</text><text x='300' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--text-dim)'>High aspect ratio = larger span, narrower chord</text><text x='300' y='258' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Better performance, but larger wingtip vortices and induced drag.</text><text x='300' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Example: 10 m span, 25 m^2 area -> AR = 100/25 = 4</text><text x='300' y='303' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Example: 10 m span, 12.5 m^2 area -> AR = 100/12.5 = 8</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Thrust as a weight component
diagrams.caption: In steady glide the weight (PTV) is decomposed into a thrust O along the flight path (equal and opposite to drag) and a perpendicular component that is countered by lift.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Decomposition: weight component along the flight path equals drag'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Thrust O = weight component along the trajectory</text><line x1='40' y1='280' x2='560' y2='280' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><text x='560' y='275' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>horizon</text><line x1='100' y1='90' x2='480' y2='280' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='6 4'/><text x='480' y='300' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>flight path (trajectory)</text><path d='M 460 280 A 30 30 0 0 0 446 270' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'/><text x='435' y='275' font-size='11' fill='var(--accent)'>alpha</text><circle cx='250' cy='185' r='5' fill='currentColor'/><line x1='250' y1='185' x2='250' y2='290' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='260' y='250' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>W (PTV)</text><line x1='250' y1='185' x2='314' y2='217' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='325' y='225' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>O (thrust)</text><line x1='250' y1='185' x2='185' y2='305' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrA)'/><text x='130' y='300' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>perpendicular comp.</text><text x='300' y='335' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>In steady glide: thrust O (component of weight along path) is equal and opposite to drag T - keeps the wing moving forward.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Glide ratio - geometric interpretation
diagrams.caption: Glide ratio equals horizontal distance over height lost. By geometry it also equals horizontal speed divided by sink rate, and equivalently L/D and Cz/Cx.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 700 360' role='img' aria-label='Geometric interpretation of glide ratio'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='350' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Glide ratio: four equivalent formulas</text><path d='M 90 90 L 90 280 L 580 280 Z' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.10'/><line x1='65' y1='90' x2='65' y2='280' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' marker-start='url(#arrB)' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='30' y='190' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>H</text><text x='30' y='208' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>(height lost)</text><line x1='90' y1='305' x2='580' y2='305' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' marker-start='url(#arrG)' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='335' y='325' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--good)'>D (horizontal distance)</text><path d='M 540 280 A 50 50 0 0 0 525 261' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'/><text x='510' y='270' font-size='12' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>alpha</text><text x='350' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Glide ratio (Finesse) =</text><text x='350' y='155' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--accent)'>D / H = horizontal speed / sink rate</text><text x='350' y='175' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--accent)'>= L / D (forces) = Cz / Cx (coefficients)</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Three rotation axes
diagrams.caption: Paragliders rotate around three perpendicular axes: pitch (transverse - nose up/down), roll (longitudinal - wingtips up/down), and yaw (vertical - wingtips forward/backward).
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Three rotation axes of a paraglider'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Three rotation axes</text><path d='M 150 175 Q 300 100 450 175' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><circle cx='300' cy='220' r='6' fill='currentColor'/><line x1='200' y1='220' x2='420' y2='220' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='8 3' marker-start='url(#arrG)' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='430' y='225' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>ROLL</text><text x='430' y='240' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>longitudinal axis</text><text x='430' y='254' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>wingtips up/down</text><line x1='150' y1='175' x2='450' y2='175' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='8 3' marker-start='url(#arrW)' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='80' y='180' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>PITCH</text><text x='80' y='195' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)'>transverse axis</text><text x='80' y='209' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)'>nose up/down</text><line x1='300' y1='80' x2='300' y2='330' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='8 3' marker-start='url(#arrB)' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='310' y='95' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>YAW</text><text x='310' y='110' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>vertical axis</text><text x='310' y='124' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>wingtips forward/back</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Stable, unstable and indifferent flight characteristics
diagrams.caption: A stable wing returns to balanced flight on its own. An unstable wing diverges further. An indifferent wing keeps whatever state was initiated. Most paragliders are INDIFFERENT in tight spirals.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Stable, unstable and indifferent flight characteristics'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Stable vs unstable vs indifferent</text><path d='M 40 240 Q 110 130 180 240' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/><circle cx='110' cy='225' r='8' fill='var(--good)'/><text x='110' y='275' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--good)'>STABLE</text><text x='110' y='292' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>returns spontaneously</text><text x='110' y='306' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>to balanced flight</text><path d='M 220 240 Q 290 130 360 240' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none' transform='translate(0 -100) scale(1 -1) translate(0 -380)'/><circle cx='290' cy='133' r='8' fill='var(--bad)'/><line x1='290' y1='150' x2='240' y2='195' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='3 3' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='290' y='275' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--bad)'>UNSTABLE</text><text x='290' y='292' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>departs further on</text><text x='290' y='306' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>its own</text><line x1='400' y1='220' x2='540' y2='220' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2.5'/><circle cx='470' cy='210' r='8' fill='var(--warn)'/><text x='470' y='275' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--warn)'>INDIFFERENT</text><text x='470' y='292' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)'>keeps whatever state</text><text x='470' y='306' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)'>was initiated</text><text x='300' y='338' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Tight spirals: most paragliders are INDIFFERENT - exit requires active control.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.caption: Four key points on the polar curve in brake order: stall (full brake) -> min sink Tmin (light brake) -> best glide Fmax (tangent from origin, trim) -> Vmax (full speed bar).

stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='80' y1='60' x2='550' y2='60' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='560' y='65' text-anchor='start' fill='var(--text-soft)'>V horizontal</text><text x='75' y='335' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--text-soft)'>sink rate</text><circle cx='80' cy='60' r='3' fill='var(--text-dim)'/><path d='M 150 200 Q 220 170 280 165 Q 360 170 460 290' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><circle cx='150' cy='200' r='5' fill='var(--bad)'/><text x='155' y='190' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700' font-size='11'>STALL</text><text x='155' y='220' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='11'>full brake</text><circle cx='270' cy='165' r='5' fill='var(--warn)'/><text x='240' y='150' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700' font-size='11'>Tmin</text><text x='220' r='5' fill='var(--good)'/><text x='350' y='175' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700' font-size='11'>Fmax</text><text x='350' y='190' fill='var(--good)' font-size='11'>best glide (trim)</text><circle diagrams.title: Polar shift with wing loading
diagrams.caption: Higher wing loading shifts the polar curve up and to the right - all speeds increase including stall speed - but the glide ratio at a given angle of attack is unchanged.

markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Higher wing loading shifts the polar up-right</text><line x1='80' y1='60' x2='80' y2='320' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='80' y1='60' x2='550' y2='60' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='560' y='65' fill='var(--text-soft)'>V horizontal</text><text x='75' y='335' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--text-soft)'>sink rate</text><path d='M 130 200 Q 200 170 260 165 Q 340 170 430 280' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><text x='450' y='275' fill='var(--accent)' font-size='11'>normal load</text><path d='M 180 230 Q 260 200 330 200 Q 420 205 510 305' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='3' fill='none' stroke-dasharray='6 3'/><text x='500' y='325' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='11'>heavier load</text><line x1='260' y1='160' x2='330' y2='195' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='1.5' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='300' y='155' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>shift up and right</text><text x='300' y='345' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Heavier wing loading raises all speeds (incl. stall) but glide ratio at a given AoA is unchanged.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Polar curve with wind and sink
diagrams.caption: Wind and vertical air motion only shift the polar relative to the ground - the polar relative to the air mass is unchanged. In a headwind or in sink, fly faster (move the tangent point further right and down) for best glide over ground.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Polar shift: headwind and sinking air'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Wind and sink shift the origin - fly faster in headwind or sink</text><line x1='80' y1='60' x2='80' y2='320' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='80' y1='60' x2='550' y2='60' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='560' y='65' fill='var(--text-soft)'>V over ground</text><text x='75' y='335' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--text-soft)'>sink rate</text><circle cx='80' cy='60' r='3' fill='var(--text-dim)'/><text x='90' y='75' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>still air origin</text><path d='M 150 200 Q 220 170 280 165 Q 360 170 460 290' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><circle cx='180' cy='60' r='4' fill='var(--bad)'/><text x='185' y='52' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='10' font-weight='700'>headwind origin</text><line x1='80' y1='60' x2='180' y2='60' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><circle cx='80' cy='130' r='4' fill='var(--warn)'/><text x='85' y='148' fill='var(--warn)' font-size='10' font-weight='700'>sinking air origin</text><line x1='80' y1='60' x2='80' y2='130' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><line x1='180' y1='60' x2='430' y2='280' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='5 3'/><circle cx='420' cy='270' r='5' fill='var(--good)'/><text x='430' y='260' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>new best-glide point</text><text x='430' y='275' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>(faster airspeed)</text><text x='300' y='345' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Headwind: shift origin RIGHT. Tailwind: shift LEFT. Sink: DOWN. Lift: UP. Re-tangent for new Fmax.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Forces and load factor in a turn
diagrams.caption: In a stabilized turn the vertical weight P combines with horizontal centrifugal Fc to give a larger, tilted resultant R. The load factor R/P = 1.15 G at 30 deg, 1.4 G at 45 deg, 2 G at 60 deg, and rises sharply beyond.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Force balance and load factor in a stabilized turn'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Stabilized turn: R = P + Fc (vector sum)</text><path d='M 130 130 Q 270 100 410 170' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><circle cx='270' cy='190' r='6' fill='currentColor'/><line x1='270' y1='190' x2='270' y2='310' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='280' y='265' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>P (weight)</text><line x1='270' y1='190' x2='400' y2='190' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='340' y='180' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>Fc (centrifugal)</text><line x1='270' y1='190' x2='400' y2='310' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrA)'/><text x='405' y='310' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>R (effective)</text><line x1='270' y1='310' x2='400' y2='310' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><line x1='400' y1='190' x2='400' y2='310' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><line x1='130' y1='130' x2='410' y2='170' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><text x='495' y='95' text-anchor='end' font-weight='700' fill='var(--accent)'>Load factor</text><text x='495' y='115' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>30 deg: ~1.15 G</text><text x='495' y='130' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>45 deg: 1.4 G</text><text x='495' y='145' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>60 deg: 2 G</text><text x='495' y='160' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>70 deg: ~3 G</text><text x='495' y='175' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>80 deg: ~6 G</text><text x='300' y='350' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Beyond 45 deg bank, both load and stall speed rise dramatically with each extra degree.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Load factor vs bank angle
diagrams.caption: Load factor grows non-linearly with bank: 1.4 G at 45 deg, 2 G at 60 deg, 3 G at 70 deg, 6 G at 80 deg. Speed factor grows more gradually. Stall speed rises with the speed factor.

diagrams.title: Air composition and standard atmosphere
diagrams.caption: Air is 78% nitrogen and 21% oxygen with 1% other gases. The ICAO standard atmosphere defines 1013.2 hPa and 15 deg C at sea level with a 0.65 deg C / 100 m lapse rate.

fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.65'/><rect x='60' y='100' width='65' height='40' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.7'/><rect x='125' y='100' width='4' height='40' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.85'/><text x='180' y='86' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='currentColor' font-size='13'>Nitrogen 78%</text><text x='90' y='126' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' C</text><text x='450' y='160' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--warn)'>Temp gradient: 0.65 deg C / 100 m</text><text x='450' y='195' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--text-soft)'>Pressure halves @ 5500 m</text><text x='450' y='215' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--text-soft)'>Pressure 1/4 @ 11000 m</text><text x='450' y='245' diagrams.caption: Atmospheric pressure halves at 5500 m and falls to 1/4 of sea level at 11000 m - a non-linear decrease, faster near the ground.

diagrams.title: Indirect warming of the atmosphere
diagrams.caption: The sun heats the air INDIRECTLY in three phases: (1) radiation passes through the air, (2) ground warms a thin pocket of adjacent air, (3) that pocket rises as a thermal while cooler air descends.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Three-phase indirect heating of the atmosphere by the sun'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 diagrams.title: Emagram with inversion and isothermal layers
diagrams.caption: An emagram is a snapshot of temperature vs altitude. The dry-adiabatic reference falls at 1 deg C/100 m. Inversions (temperature INCREASES with altitude) and isothermal layers (constant temperature) both block thermals.

diagrams.title: Why thermals stop rising
diagrams.caption: A rising air bubble cools at the dry adiabatic 1 deg C/100 m. Ambient air typically cools more slowly. The thermal rises as long as it stays warmer than the ambient air - it stops when temperatures equalize.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='A rising thermal bubble cools faster than the surrounding air'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 diagrams.title: Water phase transitions
diagrams.caption: Going from solid to vapour absorbs heat from the surroundings; vapour to liquid to ice releases heat. This is why saturated air cools more slowly than dry air as it rises.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Phase transitions of water and direction of heat exchange'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 fill='var(--accent)'>ICE</text><text x='125' y='190' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>solid</text><rect x='235' y='130' width='130' height='80' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' rx='8'/><text x='300' y='170' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--good)'>WATER</text><text x='300' y='190' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>liquid</text><rect x='410' y='130' width='130' height='80' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='2' rx='8' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><text x='475' y='170' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--text-soft)'>VAPOR</text><text x='475' y='190' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>invisible gas</text><line x1='190' y1='150' x2='235' y2='150' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><line x1='365' y1='150' x2='410' y2='150' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='212' y='140' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>melt</text><text x='387' y='140' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>evaporate</text><text x='300' y='100' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>ABSORBS heat (left to right)</text><line x1='235' y1='195' x2='190' y2='195' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><line x1='410' y1='195' x2='365' y2='195' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='212' y='225' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>freeze</text><text x='387' y='225' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>condense</text><text x='300' y='250' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>RELEASES heat (right to left)</text><text x='300' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Saturated air rises and cools at less than 1 deg C / 100 m (latent heat from condensation slows cooling).</text><text x='300' y='305' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Steam and mist are suspended droplets - water VAPOUR itself is invisible.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Saturation curve and dew point
diagrams.caption: The saturation curve marks 100% humidity. Air below the curve is clear; above the curve, water condenses out as mist or cloud. Cooling at constant moisture moves the point left to the curve, defining the dew point.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Saturation curve of air'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' y2='310' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='80' y1='310' x2='80' y2='50' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='550' y='328' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--text-soft)'>temperature</text><text x='72' y='55' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--text-soft)'>water vapour (g/m3)</text><path d='M 100 305 Q 250 290 350 240 Q 450 180 540 60' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><text x='320' y='80' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700' font-size='11'>saturation (100% humidity)</text><text x='320' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>UNSATURATED (clear)</text><text x='320' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>no liquid water</text><text x='250' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>SATURATED (mist/cloud)</text><text x='250' y='150' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>excess water condenses out</text><circle cx='460' cy='240' r='5' fill='var(--accent)'/><text x='470' y='245' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700' font-size='11'>P: 17 deg, 5 g/m3</text><line x1='460' y1='240' x2='350' y2='240' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><circle cx='350' cy='240' r='5' fill='var(--accent)'/><text x='340' y='262' text-anchor='end' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700' font-size='11'>P': dew point -7 deg</text><text x='300' y='350' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Cooling at constant moisture moves left to the curve - that crossing is the dew point.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Cloud altitude bands
diagrams.caption: Cloud naming by altitude: cirro- (6000-10000 m, ice), alto- (3000-6000 m), cumulus and stratus (under 3000 m). Cumulonimbus is the dangerous vertical-development cloud reaching ~10000 m.

diagrams.title: Three causes of cloud formation
diagrams.caption: Clouds form when air rises and cools to its dew point: (1) convection from heated ground, (2) orographic - wind forced over terrain, (3) frontal - warm air sliding over cold.

stroke='var(--text-soft)' stroke-width='1.5'/><ellipse cx='370' cy='110' rx='35' ry='15' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.5' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='280' y1='220' x2='340' y2='150' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='270' y='160' fill='var(--warn)' font-size='10'>wind forced up</text><text x='350' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>mountain</text><text x='585' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='12'>(3) Frontal</text><path d='M 490 250 L 690 80 L 690 diagrams.title: Wind direction conventions
diagrams.caption: Wind direction is named by where the wind comes FROM (045 = NE wind, 135 = SE wind, 315 = NW wind). Knots to km/h: multiply by 2 and subtract 10%.

y1='255' x2='205' y2='190' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='285' y='270' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>SE wind</text><text x='285' y='283' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)'>(135)</text><line x1='125' y1='115' x2='195' y2='180' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='115' y='105' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>NW wind</text><text x='115' y='118' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>(315)</text><circle cx='200' cy='185' r='4' fill='currentColor'/><rect x='370' y='80' width='200' height='180' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='470' y='105' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--text)'>knots to km/h</text><text x='470' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--accent)'>x 2, then -10%</text><text x='470' y='160' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>10 kt -> 20 - 2 = 18 km/h</text><text x='470' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>25 kt -> 50 - 5 = 45 km/h</text><text x='470' y='200' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>15 kt -> 30 - 3 = 27 km/h</text><text x='470' y='230' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>'070/15kt' = ENE wind</text><text x='470' y='248' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>blowing at ~28 km/h</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Wind rotation around pressure centers
diagrams.caption: In the northern hemisphere, wind flows CLOCKWISE around highs (H) and ANTI-clockwise around lows (L). Wind direction is parallel to isobars (Coriolis effect). Memory: anti- in the middle.

fill='none' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2'/><circle cx='440' cy='180' r='90' fill='none' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2'/><path d='M 440 100 A 80 80 0 0 0 360 180' fill='none' diagrams.title: Isobar spacing and wind strength
diagrams.caption: Tightly spaced isobars mean a steep pressure gradient and strong wind. Widely spaced isobars mean a flat gradient and light winds. Wind blows parallel to the isobars.

diagrams.title: Valley winds: day vs night
diagrams.caption: During the day, sunlit peaks and side valleys heat faster than the main valley, drawing air UP. At night, peaks cool faster, so cold air flows DOWN into the main valley. Strongest mid-afternoon in July/August.

diagrams.title: Structure of a thermal column
diagrams.caption: A mountain thermal forms above a sunlit ground patch, rises as a more-or-less cylindrical column, and marks its top with a cumulus cloud. Surrounding air sinks. Best ground: dark, dry, rough, sheltered from wind.

diagrams.title: Three types of turbulence
diagrams.caption: Mechanical turbulence forms downwind of obstacles (extends up to 10x obstacle height). Shear turbulence forms between layers with different wind speed/direction. Thermal turbulence at the boundary between rising and sinking air.

diagrams.title: Venturi effect at terrain constrictions
diagrams.caption: Wind accelerates where the airflow area is constricted - through mountain gaps, over ridges, or into valleys. Same mass of air must pass through a smaller cross-section, so velocity rises.

diagrams.title: Cold front cross-section
diagrams.caption: A cold front: cold air shoves abruptly under warm, forcing warm air upward. Characterized by a barrier of cumulonimbus with thunderstorms, hail and gusts; behind the front, fresh polar air with low cumulus.

diagrams.title: Cumulonimbus storm structure
diagrams.caption: A cumulonimbus has a strong updraft, a cold downdraft with rain/hail, an anvil top reaching ~10000 m and a gust front at the ground. All currents are stronger than any paraglider.

diagrams.title: Lenticular cloud from mountain wave
diagrams.caption: A lenticular altocumulus forms above 3500 m when moderate-to-strong wind ripples over terrain. The cloud is stationary because air condenses on the rising side and evaporates on the descending side.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 700 360' role='img' aria-label='Lenticular cloud formation from a mountain wave'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker font-size='12'><text x='350' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Lenticular altocumulus (mountain wave)</text><path d='M 100 290 L 250 130 L 400 290 Z' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='var(--text-soft)' stroke-width='1.5'/><path d='M 30 200 Q 220 150 400 130 Q 500 100 620 130 Q 670 150 670 180' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><path d='M 30 230 Q 220 180 400 160 Q 500 130 620 160 Q 670 180 670 210' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><ellipse cx='510' cy='110' rx='55' ry='12' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.5' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='510' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--accent)' font-size='12'>Lenticular Ac</text><text x='510' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)'>stationary, above 3500 m</text><text x='475' y='160' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)'>condenses on rising side</text><text x='545' y='160' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)'>evaporates on falling side</text><line x1='480' y1='150' x2='495' y2='125' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><line x1='545' y1='150' x2='530' y2='125' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><line x1='30' y1='170' x2='100' y2='170' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='30' y='160' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700' font-size='11'>moderate-to-strong wind</text><text x='350' y='330' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Cloud stays stationary because water condenses on the ascending side and evaporates on the descending side.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Occluded front: two types
diagrams.caption: When the cold front catches the warm front: if the cold air behind is WARMER than the cold air ahead, occlusion has warm-front character (a); if COLDER, cold-front character (b).
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 700 360' role='img' aria-label='Occlusion: warm-type vs cold-type'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker font-size='12'><text x='350' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Occluded front: cold front overtakes warm front</text><text x='175' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='12'>(a) warm-front character</text><line x1='30' y1='270' x2='330' y2='270' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='30' y='285' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>ground</text><rect x='250' y='270' width='80' height='30' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.25'/><text x='290' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>cold (ahead)</text><path d='M 250 270 L 50 100 ' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='30' y='270' width='150' height='30' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.12'/><text x='100' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>cool (behind)</text><path d='M 180 270 L 30 130' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><path d='M 250 270 L 50 100 L 30 130 L 180 270 Z' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.15'/><text x='130' y='200' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='10'>warm air aloft</text><text x='175' y='325' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>cold behind WARMER than cold ahead</text><text x='525' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--accent)' font-size='12'>(b) cold-front character</text><line x1='380' y1='270' x2='680' y2='270' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><rect x='550' y='270' width='130' height='30' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.12'/><text x='615' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>cool (ahead)</text><rect x='380' y='270' width='100' height='30' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.4'/><text x='430' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>cold (behind)</text><path d='M 480 270 L 670 100' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M 550 270 L 670 140' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><path d='M 550 270 L 670 100 L 670 140 Z' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.15'/><text x='600' y='180' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='10'>warm aloft</text><text x='525' y='325' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>cold behind COLDER than cold ahead</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Foehn over a mountain range
diagrams.caption: Moist air rises and cools at ~0.6 deg C/100 m (wet adiabatic), loses moisture as rain at the peak, then descends warming at 1 deg C/100 m. The leeward side ends up warmer, drier and more gusty.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 700 360' role='img' aria-label='Foehn effect: wet adiabatic up, dry adiabatic down'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='350' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Foehn effect over a mountain range</text><path d='M 100 290 L 280 90 L 460 290 Z' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='var(--text-soft)' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='30' y1='290' x2='670' y2='290' stroke='var(--text-soft)' stroke-width='1'/><path d='M 130 130 Q 200 80 280 100 L 280 150 L 130 150 Z' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.5' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='180' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='currentColor' font-size='11'>cloud/rain</text><line x1='150' y1='150' x2='150' y2='240' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><line x1='180' y1='150' x2='180' y2='240' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><line x1='210' y1='150' x2='210' y2='240' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><line x1='160' y1='280' x2='260' y2='130' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrA)'/><text x='65' y='200' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700' font-size='11'>moist air rises</text><text x='65' y='215' fill='var(--accent)' font-size='10'>cools at ~0.6 deg C/100 m</text><text x='65' y='228' fill='var(--accent)' font-size='10'>(wet adiabatic)</text><text x='280' y='80' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)' font-weight='700'>peak (lost moisture)</text><line x1='320' y1='130' x2='450' y2='280' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='510' y='180' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700' font-size='11'>warm dry air falls</text><text x='510' y='195' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='10'>warms at 1 deg C/100 m</text><text x='510' y='208' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='10'>(dry adiabatic)</text><path d='M 470 260 q 8 -6 16 0 q -8 6 0 12 q 8 -6 16 0' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><path d='M 500 245 q 8 -6 16 0 q -8 6 0 12 q 8 -6 16 0' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><text x='200' y='325' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>windward: COOL, WET, cloudy</text><text x='500' y='325' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>leeward: WARM, DRY, STRONG WIND, GUSTY</text><text x='350' y='350' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>If foehn active = DO NOT FLY</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Swiss foehn pressure rule
diagrams.caption: Compare Zurich (north) and Lugano (south) QNH. If the pressure difference exceeds 4-5 hPa, foehn is active and wind crosses the Alps from the over-pressure side. Do not fly.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Swiss foehn pressure rule: Zurich vs Lugano'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Swiss foehn rule: Zurich vs Lugano (QNH)</text><rect x='270' y='80' width='60' height='220' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.3' stroke='var(--text-soft)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='300' y='320' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text-soft)'>ALPS</text><circle cx='140' cy='150' r='14' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='140' y='154' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>ZRH</text><text x='140' y='185' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Zurich (500 m)</text><circle cx='460' cy='220' r='14' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='460' y='224' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>LUG</text><text x='460' y='255' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Lugano (~270 m)</text><text x='140' y='105' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>1023 hPa</text><text x='460' y='105' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>1015 hPa</text><path d='M 160 130 Q 230 130 290 170 Q 360 220 440 215' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='300' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>NORTH FOEHN</text><text x='300' y='340' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>delta P (Z - L) > 4-5 hPa = foehn active -> DO NOT FLY</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Synoptic chart symbols
diagrams.caption: Warm fronts use semicircles (red), cold fronts use triangles (blue), occluded fronts alternate both. Isobars connect points of equal pressure. H = high, L = low.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Synoptic chart symbols'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Synoptic chart symbols</text><text x='100' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>warm front</text><line x1='30' y1='100' x2='180' y2='100' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='55' cy='100' r='6' fill='var(--bad)'/><circle cx='90' cy='100' r='6' fill='var(--bad)'/><circle cx='125' cy='100' r='6' fill='var(--bad)'/><circle cx='160' cy='100' r='6' fill='var(--bad)'/><text x='300' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--accent)'>cold front</text><line x1='230' y1='100' x2='380' y2='100' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2'/><polygon points='245,100 257,88 270,100' fill='var(--accent)'/><polygon points='285,100 297,88 310,100' fill='var(--accent)'/><polygon points='325,100 337,88 350,100' fill='var(--accent)'/><polygon points='365,100 377,88 390,100' fill='var(--accent)'/><text x='500' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--warn)'>occluded</text><line x1='430' y1='100' x2='580' y2='100' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2'/><polygon points='445,100 457,88 470,100' fill='var(--warn)'/><circle cx='495' cy='100' r='6' fill='var(--warn)'/><polygon points='525,100 537,88 550,100' fill='var(--warn)'/><circle cx='575' cy='100' r='6' fill='var(--warn)'/><text x='150' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--text)'>isobar (5 hPa)</text><path d='M 50 220 Q 150 200 250 220' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'/><text x='160' y='215' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>1020</text><circle cx='400' cy='220' r='25' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='400' y='225' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='18' fill='var(--bad)'>H</text><text x='400' y='265' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>high font-size='18' fill='var(--accent)'>L</text><text x='510' y='265' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)'>low (depression)</text><text x='300' y='320' text-anchor='middle' H is also written 'A' (FR), L is 'T' (DE) or 'D' (FR).</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Swiss free-flight authority hierarchy
diagrams.caption: Only the Confederation makes airspace law. OFAC/BAZL implements it. SHV/FSVL is mandated by BAZL to issue pilot licenses. OACS (1994) is the law governing free flight.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Swiss aviation authority hierarchy'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' FSVL</text><text x='300' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>Swiss free-flight federation</text><rect x='30' y='150' width='150' height='150' fill='var(--bg-soft)' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Aeronefs de</text><text x='105' y='248' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Categorie Speciale</text><text x='105'
