diagrams.title: Four airspace information sources
diagrams.caption: Pilots consult four sources: the gliding map (GLDC) for the big picture, the AIP for monthly-updated info, VFR-NOTAM for daily temporary restrictions and KOSIF/COTSENA for daily military shooting schedules.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Four sources of airspace information'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Four airspace information sources</text><rect x='40' y='65' width='250' height='115' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/><text x='165' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--accent)'>1. Gliding Map (GLDC)</text><text x='55' y='115' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Topographic + airspace bounds</text><text x='55' y='131' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Danger zones, obstacles, cables</text><text x='55' y='147' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Military hours, frequencies</text><text x='55' y='168' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>updated: comes with AIP VFR collection</text><rect x='310' y='65' width='250' height='115' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/><text x='435' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--good)'>2. AIP</text><text x='325' y='115' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Aeronautical Information</text><text x='325' y='131' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Permanent enduring info</text><text x='325' y='147' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Jura/Alps boundary location</text><text x='325' y='168' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>updated MONTHLY</text><rect x='40' y='195' width='250' height='115' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/><text x='165' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--warn)'>3. VFR-NOTAM</text><text x='55' y='245' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Notice to Air Men</text><text x='55' y='261' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Temporary CTR/TMA activations</text><text x='55' y='277' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Flight restrictions</text><text x='55' y='298' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>updated DAILY</text><rect x='310' y='195' width='250' height='115' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/><text x='435' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--bad)'>4. KOSIF / COTSENA</text><text x='325' y='245' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Military shooting schedules</text><text x='325' y='261' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Danger zones D7, D9 etc.</text><text x='325' y='277' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- www.skyguide.ch/kosif_f</text><text x='325' y='298' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>updated DAILY</text><text x='300' y='340' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Use NOTAM and KOSIF before every flight; AIP and GLDC for long-term planning.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: VFR cloud clearances
diagrams.caption: In airspace E, paragliders keep 1.5 km horizontal and 300 m vertical from clouds (visibility 5 km below FL100, 8 km above). In active gliding zones: 100 m horizontal, 50 m vertical. In G: just out of cloud with view to ground.

diagrams.title: Aircraft priority hierarchy
diagrams.caption: Least maneuverable aircraft has priority. Distress first, then balloons, then paragliders/hang gliders/sailplanes (equal), then airships, then powered aircraft. Same class: converge - right has priority; head-on - both turn right.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 400' role='img' aria-label='VFR priority hierarchy'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Priority hierarchy (least maneuverable wins)</text><rect x='150' y='55' width='300' height='35' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.25' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='77' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>1. Aircraft in DISTRESS</text><rect x='150' y='100' width='300' height='35' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='1.5' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='122' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--warn)'>2. Balloons</text><rect x='150' y='145' width='300' height='35' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.25' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='167' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--accent)'>3. Paragliders = Hang gliders = Sailplanes</text><rect x='150' y='190' width='300' height='35' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='1.5' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='212' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>4. Airships</text><rect x='150' y='235' width='300' height='35' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.25' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='257' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--text-soft)'>5. Powered aircraft and helicopters</text><line x1='300' y1='90' x2='300' y2='100' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' marker-end='url(#arrC)'/><line x1='300' y1='135' x2='300' y2='145' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' marker-end='url(#arrC)'/><line x1='300' y1='180' x2='300' y2='190' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' marker-end='url(#arrC)'/><line x1='300' y1='225' x2='300' y2='235' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' marker-end='url(#arrC)'/><text x='460' y='90' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)' font-style='italic'>gives way to</text><rect x='50' y='290' width='500' height='90' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='312' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--text)'>Same-class rules</text><text x='65' y='335' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Converging at same altitude: glider on the RIGHT has priority</text><text x='65' y='352' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Head-on: BOTH turn right</text><text x='65' y='369' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Thermal: first glider chooses turn direction - others MUST follow</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Near-slope priority rules
diagrams.caption: Head-on near a slope: pilot with the slope on the RIGHT has priority; the other turns right (away from the slope). Overtaking, passing above/below, and spiral turns are FORBIDDEN near a slope.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Priority and overtaking rules near a slope'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Near-slope rules and head-on priorities</text><path d='M 400 320 L 580 80 L 580 320 Z' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='var(--text-soft)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='510' y='200' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)' font-weight='700'>SLOPE</text><g transform='translate(200 160)'><path d='M -25 0 Q 0 -15 25 0' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.3'/><circle cx='0' cy='8' r='4' fill='var(--good)'/></g><line x1='225' y1='160' x2='370' y2='160' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='200' y='195' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>HAS PRIORITY</text><text x='200' y='210' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)'>slope on the right</text><g transform='translate(390 110)'><path d='M -25 0 Q 0 -15 25 0' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.3'/><circle cx='0' cy='8' r='4' fill='var(--bad)'/></g><path d='M 380 130 Q 350 80 280 80' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4 3' fill='none' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='420' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>MUST GIVE WAY</text><text x='420' y='105' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>turn right (away from slope)</text><rect x='40' y='240' width='520' height='100' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='262' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>Near a slope - PROHIBITED:</text><text x='55' y='285' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Overtaking (any side)</text><text x='55' y='302' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Passing above / below</text><text x='55' y='319' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Spiral turns</text><text x='320' y='285' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>Landing: lowest glider has priority</text><text x='320' y='302' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>Overtaking far from slope: pass on right</text><text x='320' y='319' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Yellow cross on field = landing closed</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: MIL-ON/MIL-OFF schedule (Alps)
diagrams.caption: In the Alps, airspace E upper limit depends on military activity. Mon-Fri MIL-ON ~08-12 and 13:30-17:00 -> FL130 (3950 m). Outside those hours, weekends and holidays MIL-OFF -> FL150 (4600 m). Exact times from the gliding map.

diagrams.title: CTR, TMA and AWY around an airport
diagrams.caption: CTR sits immediately around the runway from the ground up. TMA covers a larger area at higher altitudes (stepped floors). AWY corridors connect TMAs with upper limit FL195. Paragliders may NOT enter without permission.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 400' role='img' aria-label='CTR, TMA and AWY top view'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>CTR / TMA / AWY (top view)</text><rect x='30' y='200' width='540' height='60' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='6 3'/><text x='55' y='195' font-size='11' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>AWY (airway)</text><text x='55' y='278' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)'>upper limit FL195; lower limit varies</text><ellipse cx='300' cy='230' rx='180' ry='90' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.18' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='160' y='225' font-size='12' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>TMA</text><text x='160' y='240' font-size='10' fill='var(--warn)'>(terminal area)</text><ellipse cx='300' cy='230' rx='90' ry='45' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.25' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='300' y='235' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>CTR</text><rect x='270' y='225' width='60' height='8' fill='var(--text-soft)'/><rect x='30' y='40' width='540' height='35' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='62' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='11' fill='var(--text)'>CTR: ground around runway | TMA: stepped lower limits above CTR | AWY: connects TMAs, upper FL195</text><text x='300' y='325' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Paragliders may NOT enter CTR, TMA or AWY without permission - these are controlled airspace.</text><text x='300' y='370' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Sion CTR example: ~20 km long, 5 km wide, GND to 3950 m. TMA extends east with stepped floors 900/1850/3050 m.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Theory exam structure
diagrams.caption: 100-question multiple-choice theory exam split into 5 subjects of 20 questions each. Pass: 16/20 (80%) per subject. Practical: two flights with two 360 deg right turns (20 s) and a figure-8 (30 s), landing within 30 m.

diagrams.title: Licensing exam time limits
diagrams.caption: Minimum 9 days between registration and exam; 9 days between theory and practical; max 36 months between them. Failed exam: wait 12 days. Appeals to OFAC/BAZL within 30 days. Min age 16, no maximum, no medical.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Licensing exam time limits'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' flights per year</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Tandem A vs B licenses
diagrams.caption: Tandem (A) allows ANY passenger including unlicensed ones. Tandem (B) only allows a passenger who holds a solo license in the same category. Multiple passengers are never allowed under either license.

passenger</text><rect x='40' y='320' width='520' height='30' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='1.5' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='340' text-anchor='middle' diagrams.title: Four main parts of a paraglider
diagrams.caption: A paraglider is built from four parts: (a) wing (airfoil ~30-40 cm thick), (b) lines (strong low-stretch), (c) risers (webbing straps), and (d) harness containing pilot seat, back protection and reserve.

diagrams.title: Wing anatomy: cells, ribs, stabilizers
diagrams.caption: The wing is divided into cells with open mouths at the leading edge (inflate the wing). Internal ribs/cell walls run between upper and lower surfaces. Stabilizers at each wingtip keep the wing open laterally.

diagrams.title: Ripstop fabric and coating care
diagrams.caption: Ripstop fabric weaves a stronger thread every few mm to stop tears propagating. The coating that gives low porosity is damaged by detergents, humid storage, sand, sun, seawater and fuels; safe care is cold water and dark dry storage.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Ripstop fabric weave and care'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' fill='none'><line x1='60' y1='60' x2='60' y2='210'/><line x1='90' y1='60' x2='90' y2='210'/><line x1='120' y1='60' x2='120' y2='210'/><line x1='150' y1='60' x2='150' y2='210'/><line x1='180' y1='60' x2='180' y2='210'/><line x1='210' y1='60' x2='210' y2='210'/><line x1='240' y1='60' x2='240' y2='210'/><line x1='60' y1='60' x2='240' y2='60'/><line x1='60' y1='85' x2='240' y2='85'/><line x1='60' y2='210'/></g><g stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3'><line x1='90' y1='60' x2='90' y2='210'/><line x1='210' y1='60' x2='210' y2='210'/><line x1='60' y1='85' x2='240' y2='85'/><line x1='60' y1='185' x2='240' y2='185'/></g><text x='150' y='235' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--accent)'>ripstop weave</text><text x='150' y='250' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>stronger thread every few mm</text><text x='150' y='266' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>stops tears propagating</text><rect x='290' y='60' width='280' height='210' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='430' y='82' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--text)'>Coating care</text><text x='305' y='110' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>HARMFUL</text><text x='305' y='126' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- detergents</text><text x='305' y='140' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- humid storage (mold)</text><text x='305' y='154' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- sand, gravel, salt</text><text x='305' y='168' font-size='10' rinse</text><text x='305' y='254' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- cool dark storage</text><text x='300' y='310' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Aged fabric = higher porosity -> wing stalls EARLIER than expected.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Line tree (A/B/C/D + brake)
diagrams.caption: Lines are grouped by attachment to the wing: A at the leading edge, then B, C, D toward the trailing edge, plus brake (F). A and B carry about twice the load of C and D.

diagrams.title: Line cross-section: core and sheath
diagrams.caption: Each line has an inelastic load-bearing core (Dyneema = white, or Kevlar = yellow/brown) inside a braided nylon sheath that protects against UV and abrasion. Tolerance: ~3 cm stretch on 6 m at 50 N.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Line core and sheath cross-section'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--text-soft)' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='200' cy='180' r='45' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.5' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke='var(--text-soft)' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='3 2'/><text x='345' y='128' font-size='11' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>core</text><text x='345' y='144' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>inelastic load-bearing fibers</text><line x1='268' y1='180' x2='340' y2='200' stroke='var(--text-soft)' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='3 2'/><text x='345' y='200' diagrams.title: Line strength: knot vs splice
diagrams.caption: A single knot reduces line strength by MORE THAN HALF. Sewing loops in Kevlar reduces strength up to 40%. Splicing is the preferred technique for aramid lines. Damaged lines = grounded wing.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Line junction strength: knot vs splice'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Line junctions: knot vs splice</text><text x='150' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>knot</text><line x1='40' y1='130' x2='100' y2='130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M 100 130 Q 130 100 160 130 Q 130 160 100 130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><line x1='160' y1='130' x2='260' y2='130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><text x='150' y='200' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--bad)'>STRENGTH DROPS BY MORE THAN HALF</text><text x='150' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>NEVER repair lines with knots</text><text x='450' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>splice</text><line x1='340' y1='130' x2='430' y2='130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='420' y='124' width='40' height='12' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.5' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='1'/><line x1='460' y1='130' x2='560' y2='130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><text x='450' y='200' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--good)'>STRENGTH PRESERVED</text><text x='450' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>preferred for Kevlar (sewing -40%)</text><rect x='40' y='250' width='520' height='95' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='272' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>If a line is severed or damaged:</text><text x='55' y='295' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- DO NOT FLY - especially A/B lines</text><text x='55' y='312' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Replace ONLY with original manufacturer parts via authorized service centre</text><text x='55' y='329' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Never knot or string-repair a damaged line</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Line length affects angle of attack
diagrams.caption: If A lines stretch or D lines shorten, the angle of attack increases - the wing is harder to inflate and parachutal-stall risk rises. If A shorten or D stretch, AoA drops - easier to inflate but frontal-collapse risk rises.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 700 360' role='img' aria-label='Effect of line length changes on angle of attack'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' font-size='12'><text x='350' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Line length changes shift the angle of attack</text><text x='175' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>A longer OR D shorter</text><g transform='translate(120 110) rotate(-15)'><path d='M 0 30 Q 30 0 80 0 Q 130 0 150 25 L 158 30 L 150 33 Q 130 32 80 32 Q 30 32 0 30 Z' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/></g><text x='175' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--bad)'>AoA UP</text><text x='175' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>harder to inflate</text><text x='175' y='256' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>flies slower</text><text x='175' y='272' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>parachutal-stall risk</text><text x='525' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--warn)'>A shorter OR D longer</text><g transform='translate(470 100)'><path d='M 0 30 Q 30 0 80 0 Q 130 0 150 25 L 158 30 L 150 33 Q 130 32 80 32 Q 30 32 0 30 Z' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/></g><text x='525' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--warn)'>AoA DOWN</text><text x='525' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>easier to inflate</text><text x='525' y='256' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>flies faster</text><text x='525' y='272' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>frontal-collapse risk</text><text x='350' y='310' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>If B lines alone shorten, only profile changes - AoA roughly unchanged.</text><text x='350' y='328' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Sheath shrinkage from dirt/moisture acts the same as a shortened line.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Speed bar (accelerator) effect
diagrams.caption: Pushing the speed bar shortens the A risers most, B less, sometimes a little of C, leaving D unchanged. The pulley system reduces angle of attack and speeds the wing up.

diagrams.title: Trim-tabs effect
diagrams.caption: Trim-tabs shorten or lengthen the D (and sometimes C) risers. Engaged trim = D shorter = AoA higher = slow flight, less prone to frontal collapse. Released = fast flight, more prone to collapse.

fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>D short</text><line x1='220' y1='160' x2='370' y2='160' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrC)'/><text x='295' y='155' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='currentColor' font-weight='700'>engage</text><rect x='40' y='275' width='250' height='70' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='1.5' rx='4'/><text x='165' y='296' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--warn)'>T' engaged (slow)</text><text x='55' y='315' font-size='10' collapse</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Brake lines: proper rearward arc
diagrams.caption: In arms-up flight, brake lines should arc backward due to drag. Straight or forward lines = too short = stall risk. The factory-set length is critical and should never be changed.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Brake line proper arc in arms-up flight'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>CORRECT: arc backward</text><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='200' y2='100' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><text x='100' y='95' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>trailing edge</text><path d='M 110 110 Q 100 200 130 270' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><path d='M 190 110 Q 200 200 170 270' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><circle cx='130' cy='270' r='8' fill='var(--good)'/><circle cx='170' cy='270' r='8' fill='var(--good)'/><text x='150' y='300' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)'>handles</text><line x1='240' y1='200' x2='220' y2='200' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='245' y='205' font-size='10' fill='var(--warn)'>wind</text><text x='450' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>WRONG: too short / straight</text><line x1='400' y1='100' x2='500' y2='100' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='410' y1='110' x2='430' y2='270' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='490' y1='110' x2='470' y2='270' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='430' cy='270' r='8' fill='var(--bad)'/><circle cx='470' cy='270' r='8' fill='var(--bad)'/><text x='450' y='300' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>handles</text><text x='450' y='315' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>STALL RISK!</text><text x='300' y='335' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Drag bends brake lines back. NEVER modify brake line length - it is factory-set.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Foam vs airbag back protection
diagrams.caption: Foam back protection works immediately - effective even on early take-off impacts. Airbag is more effective once filled but needs time to inflate. Both supplement, never replace, active piloting.

font-size='13' fill='var(--good)'>Foam</text><rect x='80' y='80' width='140' height='130' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' rx='8'/><rect x='100' y='150' width='100' height='50' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='150' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>foam block</text><circle cx='150' cy='115' r='15' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.3'/><text x='150' y='230' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>Works IMMEDIATELY</text><text x='150' y='248' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>protects from frame 1</text><text x='150' y='264' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>even on early takeoff impact</text><text x='450' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--accent)'>Airbag</text><rect x='380' y='80' width='140' height='130' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2' rx='8'/><ellipse cx='450' cy='175' rx='45' ry='30' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='450' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>inflated</text><line x1='390' y1='195' x2='405' y2='190' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='370' y='198' text-anchor='end' font-size='9' fill='var(--accent)'>valve</text><circle cx='450' cy='115' r='15' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.3'/><text x='450' y='230' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--accent)'>MORE effective once filled</text><text x='450' y='248' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>but NEEDS TIME to inflate</text><text x='450' y='264' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>not protective at first</text><text x='300' y='310' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Passive safety (foam/airbag/helmet/reserve) does NOT replace active piloting.</text><text x='300' y='328' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Leg straps are CRITICAL - slipping out is fatal.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Karabiner spacing effects
diagrams.caption: Karabiners close together (tight chest strap) reduce turbulence feedback but increase twist risk. Wide karabiners increase feedback and reduce twist risk via a larger torque arm.

rx='6'/><circle cx='130' cy='180' r='5' fill='var(--good)'/><circle cx='170' cy='180' r='5' fill='var(--good)'/><line x1='130' y1='180' x2='130' y2='100' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2'/><line diagrams.title: Reserve parachute deployment
diagrams.caption: 5-step deployment: locate handle, grasp firmly, pull out wide, identify free air to the rear, throw HARD. Sink rate ~5.5 m/s = drop from 1.5 m - roll on landing. Repack every 4-6 months.

diagrams.title: Reserve attachment to harness
diagrams.caption: Reserve straps must attach HIGH on the shoulder straps so the deployment pulls the pilot upright. Attaching low to riser karabiners leaves the pilot seated and unable to land safely.

fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='450' y='270' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>Pilot stays SEATED</text><text x='450' y='285' x='300' y='325' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>Pull-down-apex reserve: ~2 strong central lines pull the apex down -> lower sink, slightly less stable.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Flight instruments
diagrams.caption: Variometer = most useful (vertical speed via pressure rate). Altimeter = altitude via instantaneous pressure, must be recalibrated each flight. Anemometer = least useful. GPS = position + ground speed (mandatory for competitions).

diagrams.title: Active vs passive safety
diagrams.caption: Active safety comes from good piloting, weather analysis and the choice not to fly. Passive safety is the equipment that protects you when things go wrong. Passive gear supplements, never substitutes for, active safety.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Active vs passive safety'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Active vs passive safety</text><rect x='30' y='60' width='260' height='240' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='160' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--good)'>ACTIVE</text><text x='160' y='110' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>(your decisions)</text><text x='50' y='140' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Piloting skill and training</text><text x='50' y='158' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Weather analysis</text><text x='50' y='176' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Flight rules & priorities</text><text x='50' y='194' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Right wing for your level</text><text x='50' y='212' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Pre-flight checks</text><text x='50' y='230' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Choosing not to fly</text><text x='160' y='275' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>FIRST line of defense</text><rect x='310' y='60' width='260' height='240' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='440' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--warn)'>PASSIVE</text><text x='440' y='110' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>(your equipment)</text><text x='330' y='140' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Helmet (full-face best)</text><text x='330' y='158' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Back protection (foam/airbag)</text><text x='330' y='176' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Reserve parachute</text><text x='330' y='194' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Strong gloves</text><text x='330' y='212' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Rigid walking shoes</text><text x='330' y='230' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Liability insurance</text><text x='440' y='275' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>SUPPLEMENT, not substitute</text><text x='300' y='330' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>Best passive gear cannot save a bad active decision.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Certification classes (DHV / AFNOR-CEN)
diagrams.caption: Two main certifications: AFNOR/CEN with 3 classes (standard / performance / competition) and DHV with 5 (1, 1-2, 2, 2-3, 3). Tests include 8G static load, flight manoeuvres and 600 daN shock test. SHV recognizes both.

diagrams.title: Loads on a paraglider = tension only
diagrams.caption: Because a paraglider is built only from flexible elements (fabric and lines), loads are essentially tension. Bending, compression and torsion are negligible. Extreme maneuvers can permanently stretch parts.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Paraglider components are loaded in tension only'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Paraglider loads = tension only</text><line x1='100' y1='150' x2='500' y2='150' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='6'/><line x1='95' y1='150' x2='35' y2='150' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><line x1='505' y1='150' x2='565' y2='150' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='35' y='135' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>tension</text><text x='565' y='135' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>tension</text><rect x='30' y='200' width='540' height='100' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='223' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--text)'>All paraglider parts are FLEXIBLE (fabric + lines)</text><text x='45' y='248' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Bending / torsion / compression: negligible</text><text x='45' y='266' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Acrobatics or extreme maneuvers can stretch parts permanently -> changed flight behavior</text><text x='45' y='284' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Wing loading typical 2.5-4 kg/m^2 (experienced pilots up to 4.2)</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Hypoxia onset by altitude
diagrams.caption: Instantaneous hypoxia begins from ~4000 m (first symptom: euphoria), severe by 5500-7000 m. Acute mountain sickness possible from 2800-3500 m after long exposure. Treatment: lose altitude rapidly.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 400' role='img' aria-label='Hypoxia onset by altitude'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' text-anchor='end' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>0</text><line x1='145' y1='261' x2='155' y2='261' stroke='var(--text-dim)'/><text x='140' y='265' text-anchor='end' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>2800</text><line x1='145' y1='215' x2='155' y2='215' stroke='var(--text-dim)'/><text x='140' y='219' text-anchor='end' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>4000</text><line x1='145' y1='156' x2='155' y2='156' stroke='var(--text-dim)'/><text x='140' y='160' text-anchor='end' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>5500</text><line x1='145' y1='99' x2='155' y2='99' stroke='var(--text-dim)'/><text x='140' y='103' text-anchor='end' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>7000</text><rect x='160' y='261' width='420' height='40' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1'/><text x='370' y='280' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>Acute mountain sickness (after 5-10 h)</text><text x='370' y='295' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)'>headache, breathing difficulty, edema</text><rect x='160' y='215' width='420' height='40' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='1'/><text x='370' y='234' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>Instantaneous hypoxia (from ~4000 m)</text><text x='370' y='249' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>first sign: EUPHORIA, then loss of sensory/motor skills</text><rect x='160' y='99' width='420' height='110' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.30' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='370' y='130' text-anchor='middle' paralysis,</text><text x='370' y='166' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>coma, eventually death</text><text x='370' y='192' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>3-4 min @ 6000 m safer than 3-4 h @ 5000 m</text><rect x='160' y='330' width='420' height='40' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='370' y='350' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>Treatment: LOSE ALTITUDE rapidly</text><text x='370' y='365' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>training, acclimatization help. Tobacco, alcohol, fatigue make it WORSE.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Accident response: ABC and key actions
diagrams.caption: Emergency response follows ABC: Airway, Breathing, Circulation. Unconscious but breathing victim - put in recovery position. Suspected spinal injury (back pain, limb numbness) - immobilize, do not move.

y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--bad)'>Airway</text><text x='120' y='155' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>clear airway</text><text x='120' y='172' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>conscious?</text><rect x='220' y='65' width='160' height='120' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='300' y='100' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='30' fill='var(--warn)'>B</text><text x='300' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--warn)'>Breathing</text><text x='300' y='155' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>respiratory</text><text x='300' y='172' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>function ok?</text><rect x='400' y='65' width='160' height='120' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='480' y='100' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='30' fill='var(--good)'>C</text><text x='480' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--good)'>Circulation</text><text x='480' y='155' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>pulse + bleeding</text><text x='480' y='172' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>shock risk?</text><rect x='40' y='205' width='250' height='130' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='165' y='225' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--text)'>If unconscious + breathing</text><text x='165' y='245' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>RECOVERY fill='var(--text-soft)'>on side, prevent vomit aspiration</text><rect x='310' y='205' width='250' height='130' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='435' y='225' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--text)'>Suspected spinal injury</text><text x='435' y='245' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>DO NOT MOVE</text><text x='320' y='275' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>Signs:</text><text x='335' y='292' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- severe back pain</text><text x='335' y='306' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- limb numbness</text><text x='335' y='320' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- immobilize until help</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Four pre-flight factors
diagrams.caption: Before flying, review four factors: weather (foehn rule, wind), legal/airspace (NOTAM/KOSIF), obstacles/terrain (pre-inspect launch and landing), and wildlife (eagle nesting March-May, chamois/ibex on slopes).
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Four pre-flight factors'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Four pre-flight factors to consider</text><rect x='40' y='60' width='250' height='130' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='165' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--accent)'>1. Weather</text><text x='55' y='115' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- General + local conditions</text><text x='55' y='131' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Foehn rule (Z vs L > 4 hPa)</text><text x='55' y='147' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Strongest danger: STRONG WIND</text><text x='55' y='170' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Sources: MeteoSwiss, soaringmeteo.com</text><rect x='310' y='60' width='250' height='130' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='435' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--warn)'>2. Legal / Airspace</text><text x='325' y='115' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Gliding map (1:300.000)</text><text x='325' y='131' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- VFR-NOTAM (active CTR/TMA)</text><text x='325' y='147' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- KOSIF/COTSENA (military)</text><text x='325' y='170' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Check every flight!</text><rect x='40' y='210' width='250' height='130' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='165' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--bad)'>3. Obstacles / Terrain</text><text x='55' y='265' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Pre-inspect takeoff & landing</text><text x='55' y='281' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Identify possible wind directions</text><text x='55' y='297' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Note cables, wires, trees</text><text x='55' y='320' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Map: 1:100.000 obstacles to nav</text><rect x='310' y='210' width='250' height='130' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='435' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--good)'>4. Wildlife</text><text x='325' y='265' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Golden eagle (Mar-May nest)</text><text x='325' y='281' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Chamois & ibex (slopes)</text><text x='325' y='297' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Club / warden agreements</text><text x='325' y='320' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Fly high above sensitive zones</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Wind chill in flight
diagrams.caption: A glider flying at 32 km/h in an air mass at 2 deg C gives the pilot the sensation of -11 deg C. Heat loss raises oxygen consumption and lowers performance; airflow also dehydrates you.

font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--accent)'>Ambient</text><rect x='130' y='100' width='40' height='130' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' rx='6'/><circle cx='150' cy='245' r='15' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.5' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/><rect x='145' y='195' width='10' height='50' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.6'/><text x='150' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--accent)'>2 deg C</text><line x1='220' y1='150' x2='350' y2='150' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><line x1='220' y1='170' x2='350' y2='170' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><line x1='220' y1='190' x2='350' y2='190' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='285' y='140' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>32 km/h airflow</text><text x='450' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--bad)'>Felt</text><rect x='430' y='100' width='40' height='130' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' rx='6'/><circle cx='450' cy='245' r='15' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.5' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/><rect x='445' y='225' width='10' height='20' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.6'/><text x='450' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--bad)'>-11 deg C</text><text x='300' y='305' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Heat loss raises O2 consumption and lowers performance; airflow also dries you out - hydrate on long flights.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Takeoff: decision line and point of no return
diagrams.caption: Two key marks on the launch: the decision line (last chance to abort if the wing is wrong) and the point of no return (must be airborne by here). Headwind, wing loading and obstacles set their distance.

fill-opacity='0.3'/><circle cx='70' cy='195' r='6' fill='currentColor'/><text x='70' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' font-weight='700' fill='currentColor'>start</text><line x1='275' y1='80' x2='275' y2='240' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='6 4'/><text x='275' y='70' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)'>DECISION LINE</text><text x='275' y='265' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--warn)'>last chance to abort</text><line x1='465' y1='80' x2='465' y2='290' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2.5' diagrams.title: 5-point pre-flight check
diagrams.caption: Check 5 items in order, radiating outward from yourself: (1) equipment incl. leg straps, (2) risers and lines, (3) wing, (4) wind, (5) airspace and runway - the LAST check before launch.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 400' role='img' aria-label='Five-point pre-flight check'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' cy='220' r='55' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='350' y='225' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--warn)'>2</text><circle cx='300' cy='220' r='90' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.10' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='385' y='225' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--good)'>3</text><circle cx='300' cy='220' r='130' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.08' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='425' y='225' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--accent)'>4</text><circle cx='300' cy='220' r='170' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.05' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='465' y='225' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--text-soft)'>5</text><text x='40' y='100' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--bad)'>1 - Equipment</text><text x='40' y='118' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>harness, LEG STRAPS, helmet,</text><text x='40' y='133' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>karabiners, radio, speed bar</text><text x='40' y='160' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--warn)'>2 - Risers + Lines</text><text x='40' y='178' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>no knots, no snags, brakes free</text><text x='40' y='205' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--good)'>3 - Wing</text><text x='40' y='223' font-size='11' diagrams.title: Three launch phases
diagrams.caption: Phase 1 inflate + raise (speed/force peak), phase 2 check with ~50% brakes, phase 3a accelerate, 3b lift off. Abort must happen before phase 3. Sit in harness only in phase 3c, once clear of the slope.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 700 360' role='img' aria-label='Three phases of launch with intensity'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='350' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Three phases of launch</text><line x1='40' y1='250' x2='660' y2='250' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='660' y='268' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>time</text><line x1='200' y1='80' x2='200' y2='250' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><line x1='360' y1='80' x2='360' y2='250' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><line x1='520' y1='80' x2='520' y2='250' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><text x='120' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--accent)'>1. Inflation</text><text x='120' y='80' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>1a + 1b raise</text><text x='280' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--warn)'>2. Check</text><text x='280' y='80' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>50% brakes</text><text x='440' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>3a. Accelerate</text><text x='440' y='80' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>full run</text><text x='590' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>3b. Lift off</text><text x='590' y='80' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>then 3c sit</text><path d='M 40 240 Q 100 175 160 195 Q 200 200 200 215 Q 240 220 280 200 Q 360 180 440 110 Q 510 95 520 120 Q 590 130 660 175' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><text x='60' y='160' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='11' font-weight='700'>speed/force</text><path d='M 200 240 Q 220 220 240 180 Q 280 165 320 180 Q 360 200 400 220 Q 440 235 660 245' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' fill='none' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><text x='240' y='160' fill='var(--good)' font-size='11' font-weight='700'>brakes ~50%</text><rect x='40' y='280' width='620' height='70' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='350' y='302' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--text)'>Key rule</text><text x='55' y='322' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Abort decision must be made BEFORE phase 3 begins (past the decision line)</text><text x='55' y='338' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Sit in harness ONLY in phase 3c, once safely clear of the slope</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Launch method by wind
diagrams.caption: Tailwind over 5 km/h - abort. Ideal headwind ~15 km/h - forward launch. Strong 20-25 km/h - reverse launch with the wing visible (watch for cliffs behind!). Sidewind: inflate into wind then pivot toward slope.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='When to use reverse launch'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Launch method by headwind</text><line x1='60' y1='250' x2='540' y2='250' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='540' y='270' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>headwind (km/h)</text><text x='60' y='270' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>0</text><text x='130' y='270' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>5</text><text x='200' y='270' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>15</text><text x='340' y='270' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>20</text><text x='410' y='270' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>25</text><text x='500' y='270' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>30+</text><rect x='60' y='190' width='100' height='55' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='110' y='208' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>tailwind</text><text x='110' y='225' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>>5 km/h?</text><text x='110' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>ABORT</text><rect x='160' y='190' width='180' height='55' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='250' y='208' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>forward (front)</text><text x='250' y='225' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)'>ideal ~15 km/h</text><text x='250' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good) ' font-weight='700'>face slope</text><rect x='340' y='190' width='180' height='55' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='430' y='208' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>reverse (back to slope)</text><text x='430' y='225' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--warn)'>20-25 km/h</text><text x='430' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>watch cliffs behind!</text><rect x='40' y='80' width='520' height='95' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='100' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--text)'>Reverse launch advantage</text><text x='55' y='122' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- See and control the wing during inflation/check</text><text x='55' y='138' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Wet wing also harder to inflate: several kg heavier, increases stall risk</text><text x='55' y='154' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- High altitude (thin air) needs higher airspeed and longer run</text><text x='300' y='320' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Sidewind: inflate INTO wind, then pivot toward slope during check phase.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Aerodynamic body position
diagrams.caption: Best aerodynamic position: body reclined, arms down behind the risers with elbows in, legs symmetric and tucked together. Crossed or extended legs add drag. Glide ratio improves by ~5% over launch values.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Aerodynamic body position'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Aerodynamic position (lab-tested)</text><text x='150' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>Spread = high drag</text><circle cx='150' cy='130' r='12' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/><rect x='130' y='142' width='40' height='50' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' rx='4'/><line x1='140' y1='190' x2='110' y2='250' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='160' y1='190' x2='190' y2='250' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='130' y1='155' x2='95' y2='180' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='170' y1='155' x2='205' y2='180' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><text x='450' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>Tucked = low drag</text><circle cx='450' cy='130' r='12' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='430' y='142' width='40' height='40' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/><line x1='445' y1='182' x2='450' y2='230' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='455' y1='182' x2='450' y2='230' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='430' y1='160' x2='425' y2='180' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='470' y1='160' x2='475' y2='180' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='40' y='275' width='520' height='75' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='296' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--text)'>Wind-tunnel result (Toulouse 1999)</text><text x='55' y='316' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Optimum: body reclined, arms down behind risers (elbows in), legs symmetric and tucked</text><text x='55' y='332' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Glide ratio up ~5% from launch values; speed gain only 1-2 km/h. Crossed legs = drag</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Speed-to-fly decisions
diagrams.caption: In lift fly minimum sink (slow); in sink and headwind fly faster (speed bar) to maximize glide over ground. Tailwind: fly near trim. Headwind alone: moderate. Sink rate is unaffected by horizontal wind.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Speed-to-fly decisions by wind and air motion'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Speed-to-fly: airspeed for best glide over ground</text><line x1='300' y1='65' x2='300' y2='305' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='40' y1='185' x2='560' y2='185' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='40' y='185' text-anchor='start' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>tail/lift</text><text x='560' y='185' text-anchor='end' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>head/sink</text><text x='300' y='60' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>RISING air (lift)</text><text x='300' y='325' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>SINKING air</text><rect x='40' y='70' width='250' height='110' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='165' y='100' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>tailwind + lift</text><text x='165' y='125' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--good)'>fly SLOW</text><text x='165' y='145' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>20-30% brake</text><text x='165' y='160' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>min sink for height gain</text><rect x='310' y='70' width='250' height='110' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='435' y='100' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--warn)'>headwind + lift</text><text x='435' y='125' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--warn)'>moderate</text><text x='435' y='145' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>balance penetration</text><text x='435' y='160' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>and climb</text><rect x='40' y='190' width='250' height='110' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='165' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--accent)'>tailwind + sink</text><text x='165' y='245' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--accent)'>trim / light brake</text><text x='165' y='265' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>near Fmax</text><text x='165' y='280' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>(slightly slower)</text><rect x='310' y='190' width='250' height='110' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='435' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>headwind + sink</text><text x='435' y='245' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--bad)'>fly FAST</text><text x='435' y='265' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>speed bar</text><text x='435' y='280' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>max glide over ground</text><text x='300' y='342' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Sink rate doesn't change with horizontal wind - only ground speed does.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Thermal centering
diagrams.caption: Climb rate increasing - ease the turn (you are moving toward the core). Climb rate decreasing - tighten the turn (you are leaving the core). Lost the thermal? Sharp 180 deg back finds it.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Thermal centering: tighten when climb drops'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Thermal centering</text><circle cx='300' cy='200' r='60' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.25' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><circle cx='300' cy='200' r='30' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='300' y='205' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='11' fill='var(--accent)'>core</text><text x='370' y='160' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>strongest lift</text><path d='M 200 100 Q 250 80 320 90 Q 410 100 420 200 Q 410 290 330 300 Q 230 305 195 230 Q 180 170 200 100' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' fill='none' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><text x='430' y='270' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='11' font-weight='700'>wide -> lost climb</text><text x='430' y='285' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='10'>then 180 deg to find it</text><circle cx='300' cy='200' r='45' fill='none' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5'/><line x1='340' y1='180' x2='345' y2='185' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='240' y='150' fill='var(--good)' font-size='10' font-weight='700'>climb rising = ease turn</text><text x='245' y='265' fill='var(--good)' font-size='10' font-weight='700'>climb falling = tighten</text><rect x='40' y='305' width='520' height='40' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='327' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)' font-weight='700'>Climb rate INCREASING -> ease the turn. DECREASING -> tighten the turn.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Thermal column tilted by wind
diagrams.caption: Upper wind tilts the thermal column downwind, putting the cumulus over the leeward side. Best lift is on the WINDWARD side of the column; severe sink waits downwind. Drift while circling gives the wind speed.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Thermal column tilted by wind'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Thermal column tilted by wind</text><ellipse cx='430' cy='90' rx='60' ry='22' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='430' y='95' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='currentColor' font-weight='700'>Cumulus</text><line x1='220' y1='320' x2='400' y2='110' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><line x1='280' y1='320' x2='460' y2='110' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><line x1='250' y1='310' x2='370' y2='180' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrA)'/><line x1='280' y1='310' x2='400' y2='180' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrA)'/><rect x='40' y='320' width='520' height='20' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.4'/><line x1='40' y1='130' x2='200' y2='130' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='40' y='120' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700' font-size='11'>upper wind</text><rect x='220' y='195' width='160' height='35' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='300' y='216' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>best lift here (WINDWARD)</text><rect x='420' font-weight='700'>severe sink (LEEWARD)</text><text x='300' y='350' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Drifting 3 km in 10 min while circling = ~18 km/h wind. Don't chase a drifted thermal upwind.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Ridge soaring turn direction
diagrams.caption: In ridge (dynamic) soaring along a slope, ALWAYS turn away from the ridge, into the wind. Turning into the slope risks collision with the terrain.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Ridge soaring: always turn into wind, away from slope'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.4' stroke='var(--text-soft)' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='480' y='200' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)' font-weight='700'>RIDGE</text><line x1='40' y1='150' x2='130' y2='150' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><line x1='40' y1='200' x2='130' y2='200' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><line x1='40' y1='250' x2='130' y2='250' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='40' y='140' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>wind</text><g transform='translate(280 180)'><path d='M -30 0 Q 0 -15 30 0' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.3'/><circle cx='0' cy='8' r='5' fill='var(--good)'/></g><path d='M 280 190 Q 250 160 180 175' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none' stroke-dasharray='4 3' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='200' y='150' fill='var(--good)' font-size='11' font-weight='700'>CORRECT</text><text x='200' y='165' fill='var(--good)' font-size='10'>turn AWAY from slope</text><text x='200' y='178' fill='var(--good)' font-size='10'>into the wind</text><path d='M 280 190 Q 320 220 360 200' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' fill='none' stroke-dasharray='4 3' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='370' y='240' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='11' font-weight='700'>WRONG</text><text x='370' y='255' fill='var(--bad)' font-size='10'>turn into slope</text><text x='300' y='340' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Wind hitting ridge is forced UP - dynamic lift. ALWAYS turn away from the ridge.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Crab angle in crosswind
diagrams.caption: To fly straight toward a target in crosswind, point the wing partly into the wind (crab). The drift angle grows with crosswind strength and shrinks with higher airspeed.

r='5' fill='currentColor'/><text x='300' y='70' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='currentColor' font-weight='700'>start</text><line x1='300' y1='80' x2='300' y2='285' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='6 4'/><text x='310' y='200' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>desired ground track</text><line x1='50' y1='180' x2='180' y2='180'
