fill='var(--accent)' font-size='10'>(into wind)</text><line x1='205' y1='220' x2='300' y2='280' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><path d='M 290 110 A 30 30 0 0 0 280 130' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'/><text x='275' y='105' font-size='11' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>delta</text><text x='265' y='118' font-size='10' fill='var(--accent)'>drift angle</text><rect x='400' y='220' width='180' height='80' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='490' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text-soft)'>  is stronger</text><text x='415' y='290' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- smaller when AIRSPEED</text><text x='415' y='305' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>  is higher</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Lateral and frontal collapses
diagrams.caption: Lateral collapse: wing turns toward the collapsed side - brake on the OPEN side and weight-shift. Too much input = spin. Frontal collapse: pull and release brakes to reinflate the leading edge.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 700 360' role='img' aria-label='Lateral and frontal wing collapses'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>LATERAL collapse</text><path d='M 60 130 L 100 140 L 175 100 L 250 130 L 290 145' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' fill='var(--bg-soft)'/><path d='M 60 130 L 80 150 L 110 130' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><path d='M 175 180 Q 130 200 80 200' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' fill='none' marker-end='url(#arrB)' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><text x='90' y='225' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>turns toward collapse</text><line x1='250' y1='150' x2='280' y2='220' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='280' y='235' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>brake OPEN side</text><text x='280' y='250' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)'>weight toward open side</text><text x='175' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>(too much = SPIN on open side)</text><text x='525' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--warn)'>FRONTAL collapse</text><path d='M 410 130 Q 475 90 525 100 Q 575 100 640 130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' fill='var(--bg-soft)'/><path d='M 475 105 Q 525 130 575 105' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><text x='525' y='150' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>leading edge folded</text><line x1='525' y1='160' x2='525' y2='220' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='525' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)' font-weight='700'>pull and release brakes</text><text x='525' y='255' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)'>to reinflate</text><rect x='40' y='305' width='620' height='40' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='350' y='328' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)' font-weight='700'>Lateral: priority is keeping direction (not autorotating into terrain).</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Rapid descent maneuvers
diagrams.caption: Big ears: symmetrical outer A pull, 3-4 m/s sink, no load factor, slight parachutal risk. B-stall: pull B risers, > 5 m/s vertical, higher parachutal risk - release quickly. Spiral: tight 360s, fastest, high G-forces.

fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='130' y='85' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--good)'>Big Ears</text><path d='M 60 130 L 75 140 L 130 110 L 185 140 L 200 130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' fill='var(--bg-soft)'/><path d='M 60 130 L 80 145 L 100 130' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/><path d='M 160 130 L 180 145 L 200 130' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/><text x='130' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>pull OUTER A lines</text><text x='130' y='195' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>symmetrically</text><text x='130' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>sink 3-4 m/s</text><text x='130' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)'>NO load factor</text><text x='130' y='258' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>continues forward</text><text x='130' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--warn)'>slight parachutal stall</text><text x='130' y='298' text-anchor='middle' fill='var(--text-soft)'>(symmetrically)</text><text x='350' y='245' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--warn)'>vertical descent > 5 m/s</text><text x='350' y='265' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)'>NO load factor</text><text x='350' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>HIGHER parachutal stall</text><text x='350' y='298' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>pendular swing</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Full stall vs parachutal stall vs spin
diagrams.caption: Full stall: wing deflates, extremely dangerous. Parachutal stall: wing keeps shape, no airflow - pull risers to recover or ride to ground. Spin: yaw rotation with halves moving opposite directions - arms up.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 700 360' role='img' aria-label='Full stall vs parachutal stall vs spin'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' font-size='12'><text x='350' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Stall configurations vs spin</text><rect x='30' y='60' width='200' height='280' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='130' y='85' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--bad)'>Full stall</text><path d='M 50 130 Q 130 145 200 130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' fill='var(--bg-soft)' fill-opacity='0.4'/><text x='130' y='165' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>wing partially deflates,</text><text x='130' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>loses arched shape</text><text x='130' y='205' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>cause: brakes pulled</text><text x='130' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>too hard / too far</text><text x='130' y='245' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>EXTREMELY DANGEROUS</text><text x='130' y='270' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>only practice over</text><text x='130' y='284' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>water with SIV instructor</text><rect x='250' y='60' width='200' height='280' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='350' y='85' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--warn)'>Parachutal stall</text><path d='M 270 130 Q 350 110 430 130 Q 350 145 270 130 Z' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' fill='var(--bg-soft)'/><text x='350' y='165' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--warn)'>wing keeps shape, but</text><text x='350' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--warn)'>underside is CONCAVE</text><text x='350' y='205' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>no wind on face,</text><text x='350' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>no brake tension</text><text x='350' y='245' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--warn)'>RECOVERY:</text><text x='350' y='262' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)'>with altitude: pull risers</text><text x='350' y='276' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)'>near ground: ride it down,</text><text x='350' y='290' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)'>roll on landing</text><rect x='470' y='60' width='200' height='280' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='570' y='85' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--bad)'>Spin (yaw rotation)</text><path d='M 490 130 Q 530 95 570 130 Q 610 165 650 130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' fill='var(--bg-soft)'/><line x1='510' y1='130' x2='490' y2='150' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><line x1='630' y1='130' x2='650' y2='110' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='570' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>one half forward,</text><text x='570' y='195' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>other half backward</text><text x='570' y='220' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>cause: braking too far,</text><text x='570' y='235' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>too fast asymmetrically</text><text x='570' y='260' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>RECOVERY:</text><text x='570' y='277' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--good)'>arms UP completely</text><text x='570' y='292' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>NB: TWIST = pilot rotates</text><text x='570' y='306' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>vs wing (different thing)</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Volte landing pattern (U)
diagrams.caption: Four phases of the volte: (1) descending 360s upwind of the field to 50-70 m, (2) downwind leg, (3) crosswind base, (4) final approach into the wind to the target. Convention is left-pattern.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 700 400' role='img' aria-label='Volte landing pattern with four phases'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='350' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Volte landing pattern (U) - 4 phases</text><line x1='350' y1='380' x2='350' y2='340' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='360' y='370' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>wind</text><circle cx='350' cy='340' r='12' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.5' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2'/><text x='350' y='344' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' font-weight='700' fill='var(--good)'>T</text><path d='M 200 130 Q 130 140 130 200 Q 130 250 200 250 Q 250 245 240 200 Q 230 165 200 175 Q 175 185 180 215' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/><text x='160' y='115' font-weight='700' font-size='11' fill='var(--accent)'>1. Descend (360s)</text><text x='160' y='130' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>upwind side, to 50-70 m</text><line x1='240' y1='220' x2='240' y2='100' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrG)'/><text x='150' y='180' font-weight='700' font-size='11' fill='var(--good)'>2. Downwind</text><line x1='240' y1='100' x2='450' y2='100' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrW)'/><text x='345' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)'>3. Crosswind</text><line x1='450' y1='100' x2='450' y2='250' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2.5'/><line x1='450' y1='250' x2='350' y2='325' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='460' y='180' font-weight='700' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)'>4. Final approach</text><text x='460' y='195' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-soft)'>into wind, eyes on target</text><text x='350' y='395' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Convention: left pattern. Eyes always on TARGET (briefly check obstacles).</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Landing height corrections
diagrams.caption: Too HIGH: enlarge crosswind base; on final brake and stand up (careful: 80%+ brake = stall risk). Too LOW: shorten base; arms up for max glide. Strong wind: turn 180 deg to face wing, NEVER brake.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Landing height corrections'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Landing height corrections</text><rect x='30' y='60' width='270' height='140' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='165' y='85' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--bad)'>TOO HIGH</text><text x='45' y='110' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)' font-weight='700'>downwind:</text><text x='45' y='128' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>enlarge crosswind base</text><text x='45' y='150' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)' font-weight='700'>final approach:</text><text x='45' y='168' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>brake and stand up (drag)</text><text x='45' y='188' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>WARNING: 80%+ brake = stall risk</text><rect x='310' y='60' width='270' height='140' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' rx='6'/><text x='445' y='85' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='13' fill='var(--warn)'>TOO LOW</text><text x='325' y='110' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)' font-weight='700'>downwind:</text><text x='325' y='128' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>shorten crosswind base</text><text x='325' y='150' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)' font-weight='700'>final approach:</text><text x='325' y='168' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>arms up, max glide,</text><text x='325' y='184' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>brake gently near ground</text><rect x='30' y='215' width='550' height='130' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='305' y='240' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>Strong wind landing (25+ km/h)</text><text x='55' y='265' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>1. Turn 180 deg to FACE the wing on landing</text><text x='55' y='282' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>2. Run downwind to control glide</text><text x='55' y='299' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>3. Pull C and B lines to collapse the wing</text><text x='55' y='316' font-size='11' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>NEVER brake in strong wind - lift could drag you</text><text x='305' y='335' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>After landing, leave area quickly for the next pilot.</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Emergency landing priorities
diagrams.caption: When forced to choose: tree (best - branches cushion), sloped roof (rough), water (worst - drowning risk). Tree: stay roped until rescue. Water: UNCLIP HARNESS BEFORE contact.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Emergency landing priorities'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Emergency landing - choose the least harmful option</text><rect x='40' y='60' width='520' height='65' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/><text x='65' y='90' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--good)'>1. TREE (best)</text><path d='M 180 110 L 195 80 L 210 110 Z' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.5'/><rect x='192' y='110' width='6' height='10' fill='currentColor'/><text x='240' y='90' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>Branches cushion impact</text><text x='240' y='107' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)'>BUT: stay roped/secured until rescue - falling = #1 injury</text><rect x='40' y='135' width='520' height='65' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--warn)' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/><text x='65' y='165' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--warn)'>2. SLOPED ROOF</text><polygon points='180,185 195,160 210,185' fill='var(--warn)' fill-opacity='0.5'/><rect x='180' y='185' width='30' height='8' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.5'/><text x='240' y='165' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>Possible but rough impact</text><rect x='40' y='210' width='520' height='65' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.15' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/><text x='65' y='240' font-weight='700' font-size='14' fill='var(--bad)'>3. WATER (worst)</text><path d='M 175 250 q 7 -4 14 0 q 7 4 14 0 q 7 -4 14 0' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><text x='240' y='240' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>Drowning risk if wing pulls you under</text><text x='240' y='257' font-size='10' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>UNCLIP HARNESS BEFORE contact!</text><rect x='40' y='285' width='520' height='65' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='300' y='308' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--text)'>After contact</text><text x='55' y='328' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- Tree: do NOT untether yourself - branches yield, fall causes most injuries</text><text x='55' y='344' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- To free wing from tree: cut top of tree if needed; undo at quick links</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Helicopter rescue preparation
diagrams.caption: When a helicopter rescue is incoming: suspend ALL flight activity and remove any loose fabric (spread paragliders, clothing) from the landing area. Rotor downwash can lift these into the blades.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 320' role='img' aria-label='Preparing landing zone for helicopter rescue'><defs><marker id='arrC' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker><marker id='arrG' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--good)'/></marker><marker id='arrW' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--warn)'/></marker><marker id='arrD' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--text-dim)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><text x='300' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='13' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Helicopter rescue - clear the landing zone</text><rect x='340' y='75' width='50' height='25' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.5' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5' rx='6'/><rect x='355' y='80' width='6' height='10' fill='var(--bg-soft)'/><rect x='370' y='80' width='6' height='10' fill='var(--bg-soft)'/><line x1='330' y1='75' x2='400' y2='75' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='362' y1='100' x2='370' y2='115' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='363' y1='115' x2='370' y2='115' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='200' cy='220' r='80' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.2' stroke='var(--good)' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 3'/><text x='200' y='225' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--good)'>cleared zone</text><line x1='365' y1='115' x2='260' y2='190' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='4 3' marker-end='url(#arrA)'/><rect x='420' y='150' width='160' height='130' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)' rx='4'/><text x='500' y='170' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' font-size='12' fill='var(--bad)'>REMOVE ALL:</text><text x='435' y='190' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- spread paragliders</text><text x='435' y='207' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- loose clothing</text><text x='435' y='224' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-soft)'>- any loose fabric</text><text x='435' y='255' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>+ suspend ALL</text><text x='435' y='270' font-size='11' fill='var(--warn)' font-weight='700'>  flight activity</text><text x='300' y='305' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='var(--text-dim)'>Rotor downwash can lift fabric into the rotor blades - extremely dangerous.</text></g></svg>
